title: Software Engineering
shortDescription: Build software products and reliable systems.
description: Software engineering fits students who enjoy logic, debugging, product building, and turning ideas into working digital tools.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data frames this path around designing, developing, testing, and maintaining software.
Strong fit for profiles showing logical reasoning, persistence, and interest in building digital products.

first30Days: Choose one stack: web, mobile, or backend.
Build one small portfolio project.
Practice Git and clean project structure.
next60Days: Add a database or API to your project.
Join a hackathon or coding sprint.
Start applying to beginner internships.
next90Days: Ship a polished project with README.
Contribute to one open-source issue.
Practice technical interview basics.

title: Web Development
shortDescription: Create websites, web apps, and interactive digital experiences.
description: Web development is a practical path for students who want fast visible progress, portfolio projects, and a direct route into internships or freelance work.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data links this path to building web applications, databases, and interactive interfaces.
Strong fit for students who want visible project output and fast portfolio development.

first30Days: Build two responsive pages with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Learn GitHub Pages or simple deployment.
Recreate one polished interface for practice.
next60Days: Learn one frontend framework.
Connect a small app to an API.
Build a portfolio with clear case studies.
next90Days: Ship a client-style project.
Apply for web internships or freelance tasks.
Practice accessibility and performance basics.

title: Data Science & AI
shortDescription: Use data, models, and AI systems to generate insight.
description: Data Science and AI fit students who like patterns, mathematics, experimentation, and using information to make predictions or decisions.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects this path to analyzing data, building models, and communicating findings.
Strong fit for profiles showing analytical curiosity, mathematics, and willingness to practice consistently.

first30Days: Revise Python and statistics basics.
Create one small data analysis notebook.
Learn how datasets are cleaned and visualized.
next60Days: Build a mini prediction or classification project.
Join an AI competition or hackathon.
Learn model evaluation and experimentation.
next90Days: Publish a portfolio case study.
Target AI or data internships.
Practice explaining your models clearly.

title: Cybersecurity
shortDescription: Protect systems, networks, and users against digital threats.
description: Cybersecurity fits students who enjoy investigation, networks, privacy, and solving precise technical problems under constraints.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data frames this path around protecting information systems and monitoring security risks.
Strong fit for careful, analytical profiles that can handle responsibility and continuous learning.

first30Days: Learn networking and Linux basics.
Practice security labs safely.
Understand common web vulnerabilities.
next60Days: Complete one security challenge track.
Document a simple security audit project.
Follow security news and incident reports.
next90Days: Build a portfolio with lab writeups.
Join a security community or CTF.
Apply to beginner security internships.

title: UI/UX Design
shortDescription: Design digital experiences that are useful, clear, and enjoyable.
description: UI/UX design fits students who combine empathy, creativity, research, and structured thinking to make digital products easier to use.

resourceLinks.label: O*NET Web and Digital Interface Designers

evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects this path to designing digital interfaces and improving user interaction.
Strong fit for profiles showing empathy, creativity, communication, and product curiosity.

first30Days: Study design principles and accessibility.
Redesign one app screen or flow.
Learn Figma basics.
next60Days: Create one case study from problem to prototype.
Collect user feedback and iterate.
Join a product or design challenge.
next90Days: Publish 2 to 3 portfolio case studies.
Collaborate with a developer on a prototype.
Apply to design internships.

title: Product Management
shortDescription: Turn user needs and business goals into focused products.
description: Product management fits students who like understanding people, organizing ideas, validating problems, and coordinating execution.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data links adjacent product work to planning, coordination, stakeholder communication, and execution.
Strong fit for students who can combine user needs, business priorities, and team delivery.

first30Days: Pick one problem space you care about.
Interview five potential users.
Write a one-page product brief.
next60Days: Validate an MVP idea with a simple prototype.
Learn product metrics and prioritization.
Join a startup or innovation challenge.
next90Days: Ship a small MVP with a team.
Document learnings from user feedback.
Apply to product or startup programs.

title: Business Analysis
shortDescription: Analyze needs, processes, and data to improve decisions.
description: Business analysis fits students who enjoy understanding how organizations work, asking precise questions, and translating needs into clear requirements.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects this path to organizational studies, systems, procedures, and operational improvement.
Strong fit for profiles showing analysis, communication, organization, and interest in business decisions.

first30Days: Learn requirements basics and process mapping.
Analyze one business process around you.
Practice Excel or spreadsheet dashboards.
next60Days: Write a small business requirements document.
Learn SQL or dashboard basics.
Join a case study or consulting challenge.
next90Days: Build a portfolio case: problem, data, recommendation.
Apply to business analyst internships.
Practice stakeholder interview scenarios.

title: Project Management
shortDescription: Plan, coordinate, and deliver projects with teams.
description: Project management fits students who like organization, coordination, clear milestones, and helping teams deliver work on time.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data links this path to planning, execution, and coordination of work.
Strong fit for organized students who enjoy team alignment and visible progress.

first30Days: Learn project basics: scope, tasks, milestones, risks.
Organize one small team or club initiative.
Practice using a Kanban board.
next60Days: Lead a small project with weekly updates.
Learn agile basics and reporting.
Document project outcomes and blockers.
next90Days: Build a project management portfolio page.
Apply to operations or project internships.
Practice facilitation and stakeholder updates.

title: Digital Marketing
shortDescription: Grow audiences and brands through strategy and digital channels.
description: Digital marketing fits students who enjoy communication, creativity, audience psychology, content strategy, and measuring what works.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects this path to planning campaigns, understanding markets, and communicating value.
Strong fit for creative communicators who also want to measure results.

first30Days: Choose one niche and analyze strong brands.
Create sample content pieces.
Learn analytics basics.
next60Days: Run a small campaign for a project or club.
Measure engagement and iterate.
Build a mini portfolio with results.
next90Days: Apply to marketing internships.
Offer content strategy for a student association or startup.
Document growth experiments.

title: Graphic Design
shortDescription: Create visual identities, layouts, and communication assets.
description: Graphic design fits students who enjoy visual expression, layout, branding, and turning messages into clear visual systems.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects this path to creating graphics for commercial and promotional needs.
Strong fit for creative profiles with attention to detail and visual communication instincts.

first30Days: Study typography, color, and layout basics.
Redesign three posters or social posts.
Build a simple visual moodboard.
next60Days: Create a mini brand identity project.
Learn export formats and design handoff.
Collect feedback and iterate designs.
next90Days: Publish a visual portfolio.
Offer design support to a club or startup.
Apply to junior design internships.

title: Content Creation & Media Production
shortDescription: Produce useful content through writing, video, audio, or social media.
description: Content creation and media production fit students who enjoy storytelling, explaining ideas, organizing narratives, and publishing consistently.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects adjacent media roles to creative direction, production planning, and audience communication.
Strong fit for students who enjoy explaining, creating, and publishing ideas consistently.

first30Days: Choose one content niche and format.
Create a simple content calendar.
Publish three short pieces and review performance.
next60Days: Improve scripting, editing, and hooks.
Collaborate with a club or local project.
Build a small media portfolio.
next90Days: Create a themed content series.
Apply to media or communication internships.
Document growth and lessons learned.

title: Teaching & Educational Technology
shortDescription: Help learners progress through teaching, content, and learning tools.
description: Teaching and educational technology fit students who care about learning, enjoy explaining ideas, and want to use tools to improve education.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects this path to developing instructional material and incorporating technology into learning.
Strong fit for students motivated by education, explanation, and social impact.

first30Days: Choose one topic you can teach clearly.
Create a short lesson or explainer.
Test it with one learner and collect feedback.
next60Days: Build a mini learning module.
Explore learning platforms and AI study tools.
Volunteer as a tutor or mentor.
next90Days: Publish an education portfolio project.
Join an edtech or teaching initiative.
Apply to training or education internships.

title: HR & Talent Development
shortDescription: Support people, learning, hiring, and team growth.
description: HR and talent development fit students who enjoy understanding people, communication, training, and helping teams grow.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects this path to designing and delivering training that improves individual and organizational performance.
Strong fit for people-oriented profiles with empathy, communication, and organization.

first30Days: Learn HR basics: hiring, training, feedback.
Create a simple interview guide.
Volunteer to organize a small team activity.
next60Days: Design a short training session.
Learn basic people analytics and surveys.
Support recruitment or onboarding in a club.
next90Days: Build a portfolio of HR templates.
Apply to HR or training internships.
Practice facilitation and conflict-resolution scenarios.

title: Industrial Engineering
shortDescription: Improve systems, production, quality, and operations.
description: Industrial engineering fits students who like practical systems, optimization, operations, and improving how work gets done.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects this path to designing and improving integrated systems for production and operations.
Strong fit for practical analytical profiles who want visible impact in industry.

first30Days: Learn lean basics and process mapping.
Analyze one daily process for waste or delays.
Practice Excel for operations tracking.
next60Days: Study quality control and basic statistics.
Visit or research one industrial workflow.
Build a small process improvement case study.
next90Days: Apply to industrial or operations internships.
Learn supply chain fundamentals.
Document measurable improvements in a portfolio.

title: Embedded Systems & Electronics
shortDescription: Build connected devices, circuits, and hardware-software systems.
description: Embedded systems and electronics fit students who enjoy hardware, circuits, practical engineering, and making physical systems behave intelligently.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data connects this path to designing and testing electronic components and systems.
Strong fit for hands-on technical profiles who enjoy hardware, precision, and experimentation.

first30Days: Learn basic circuits and microcontroller concepts.
Build one LED or sensor project.
Document wiring, code, and results.
next60Days: Build an Arduino or ESP32 project.
Learn C basics for embedded systems.
Study sensors, communication, and power basics.
next90Days: Create an IoT or robotics mini-project.
Apply to electronics or automation internships.
Join a lab, robotics club, or hardware competition.

title: Entrepreneurship & Startup Operations
shortDescription: Validate ideas, coordinate operations, and build early-stage ventures.
description: Entrepreneurship and startup operations fit students who want autonomy, action, problem validation, and learning across product, sales, operations, and teams.
evidenceSnippets: Structured career data links adjacent operations leadership to planning, coordinating teams, and making decisions.
Strong fit for ambitious profiles who want autonomy, execution, and broad business exposure.

first30Days: Pick one problem and define the target user.
Interview ten potential users.
Sketch a simple value proposition.
next60Days: Build a no-code or lightweight MVP.
Test pricing, channels, or acquisition.
Join a startup challenge or incubator event.
next90Days: Run a small pilot with real users.
Track simple metrics and feedback.
Prepare a pitch deck and next-step plan.
